# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  require "net/http"
  require "uri"
  require "json"
  require "securerandom"

  class SendgridError < StandardError; end

  DEFAULT_API_URL = "https://api.sendgrid.com/v3/mail/send".freeze

  def send_email(to:, subject:, html: nil, text: nil, from: nil, reply_to: nil, cc: nil, bcc: nil, headers: nil, categories: nil, template_id: nil, dynamic_template_data: nil, custom_args: nil, send_at: nil, attachments: nil, sandbox_mode: nil)
    api_key = sendgrid_api_key!
    payload = build_payload(
      to: to,
      subject: subject,
      html: html,
      text: text,
      from: from,
      reply_to: reply_to,
      cc: cc,
      bcc: bcc,
      headers: headers,
      categories: categories,
      template_id: template_id,
      dynamic_template_data: dynamic_template_data,
      custom_args: custom_args,
      send_at: send_at,
      attachments: attachments,
      sandbox_mode: sandbox_mode
    )

    response = deliver_via_sendgrid(api_key: api_key, payload: payload)

    if response.code.to_i >= 400
      raise SendgridError, "SendGrid delivery failed (#{response.code}): #{response.body}"
    end

    response
  end

  private

  def sendgrid_api_key!
    key = ENV["SENDGRID_API_KEY"].to_s
    raise SendgridError, "Missing SENDGRID_API_KEY" if key.empty?
    key
  end

  def sendgrid_api_url
    ENV["SENDGRID_API_URL"].presence || DEFAULT_API_URL
  end

  def deliver_via_sendgrid(api_key:, payload:)
    uri = URI.parse(sendgrid_api_url)
    http = Net::HTTP.new(uri.host, uri.port)
    http.use_ssl = (uri.scheme == "https")
    http.open_timeout = (ENV["SENDGRID_OPEN_TIMEOUT"].presence || 5).to_i
    http.read_timeout = (ENV["SENDGRID_READ_TIMEOUT"].presence || 30).to_i

    request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(uri.request_uri)
    request["Authorization"] = "Bearer #{api_key}"
    request["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    request["User-Agent"] = "RailsSendgridMailer/#{Rails.version}"
    request.body = JSON.generate(payload)

    http.request(request)
  end

  def build_payload(to:, subject:, html:, text:, from:, reply_to:, cc:, bcc:, headers:, categories:, template_id:, dynamic_template_data:, custom_args:, send_at:, attachments:, sandbox_mode:)
    from_email = normalize_email(from) || normalize_email(default_from_address)
    raise SendgridError, "Missing from address" unless from_email

    to_list  = normalize_recipients(to)
    cc_list  = normalize_recipients(cc)
    bcc_list = normalize_recipients(bcc)

    raise SendgridError, "Missing to recipients" if to_list.empty?
    raise SendgridError, "Missing subject" if subject.to_s.strip.empty?

    personalization = { "to" => to_list }
    personalization["cc"] = cc_list unless cc_list.empty?
    personalization["bcc"] = bcc_list unless bcc_list.empty?
    personalization["headers"] = headers if headers.present?
    personalization["categories"] = Array(categories).compact if categories.present?
    personalization["custom_args"] = custom_args if custom_args.present?
    personalization["dynamic_template_data"] = dynamic_template_data if dynamic_template_data.present?

    payload = {
      "from" => from_email,
      "subject" => subject.to_s,
      "personalizations" => [personalization]
    }

    payload["reply_to"] = normalize_email(reply_to) if reply_to.present?
    payload["send_at"] = Integer(send_at) if send_at.present?

    if template_id.present?
      payload["template_id"] = template_id.to_s
    else
      content = []
      content << { "type" => "text/plain", "value" => text.to_s } if text.present?
      content << { "type" => "text/html", "value" => html.to_s } if html.present?
      raise SendgridError, "Provide html and/or text content when template_id is not set" if content.empty?
      payload["content"] = content
    end

    if attachments.present?
      payload["attachments"] = normalize_attachments(attachments)
    end

    if sandbox_mode.nil?
      sandbox_mode = ActiveModel::Type::Boolean.new.cast(ENV["SENDGRID_SANDBOX_MODE"])
    end
    payload["mail_settings"] = { "sandbox_mode" => { "enable" => true } } if sandbox_mode

    payload
  end

  def normalize_recipients(value)
    Array(value).flatten.compact.map { |v| normalize_email(v) }.compact
  end

  def normalize_email(value)
    case value
    when nil
      nil
    when String
      s = value.strip
      return nil if s.empty?
      if s.include?("<") && s.include?(">")
        name = s.split("<", 2).first.to_s.strip
        email = s.split("<", 2).last.to_s.sub(/>\s*\z/, "").strip
        h = { "email" => email }
        h["name"] = name unless name.empty?
        h
      else
        { "email" => s }
      end
    when Hash
      email = value[:email] || value["email"]
      return nil if email.to_s.strip.empty?
      name = value[:name] || value["name"]
      h = { "email" => email.to_s.strip }
      h["name"] = name.to_s.strip if name.present?
      h
    else
      nil
    end
  end

  def normalize_attachments(list)
    Array(list).flatten.compact.map do |att|
      case att
      when Hash
        filename = att[:filename] || att["filename"]
        type = att[:type] || att["type"]
        disposition = att[:disposition] || att["disposition"]
        content_id = att[:content_id] || att["content_id"]
        content = att[:content] || att["content"]

        if content.nil? && (path = (att[:path] || att["path"]))
          raw = File.binread(path)
          content = [raw].pack("m0")
          filename ||= File.basename(path.to_s)
        end

        raise SendgridError, "Attachment missing content" if content.to_s.empty?
        raise SendgridError, "Attachment missing filename" if filename.to_s.strip.empty?

        h = { "content" => content.to_s, "filename" => filename.to_s }
        h["type"] = type.to_s if type.present?
        h["disposition"] = disposition.to_s if disposition.present?
        h["content_id"] = content_id.to_s if content_id.present?
        h
      when String
        raw = File.binread(att)
        {
          "content" => [raw].pack("m0"),
          "filename" => File.basename(att.to_s)
        }
      else
        raise SendgridError, "Unsupported attachment: #{att.class}"
      end
    end
  end

  def default_from_address
    if self.class.respond_to?(:default_params) && self.class.default_params
      self.class.default_params[:from]
    elsif respond_to?(:default_params) && default_params
      default_params[:from]
    else
      ENV["DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL"].presence
    end
  end
end
